_comment: Hand-crafted v1 of the JD-Intent schema. Generated by reading job_description.docx in full and decomposing into structured axes. Can be regenerated by precompute/01_decode_jd_intent.py with an LLM, but this v1 is a solid baseline. Edit freely.
role_summary: Own the intelligence layer (ranking, retrieval, matching) of Redrob's product. Hybrid: deep ML depth + scrappy shipper attitude. Founding team member of new AI Engineering org.
jd_company: Redrob AI (Series A AI-native talent intelligence platform)
jd_work_mode: hybrid (flexible cadence, Tue/Thu office, quarterly offsites)

jd_yoe_band.outside_band_note: Will consider outside band if other signals are strong

explicit_positive_requirements.label: Production embeddings-based retrieval
explicit_positive_requirements.evidence_in_jd: Production experience with embeddings-based retrieval systems (sentence-transformers, OpenAI embeddings, BGE, E5, or similar) deployed to real users.
explicit_positive_requirements.embedding_query_text: embeddings-based retrieval systems sentence-transformers OpenAI BGE E5 production deployment real users embedding drift index refresh retrieval quality regression

explicit_positive_requirements.label: Production vector DB / hybrid search
explicit_positive_requirements.evidence_in_jd: Production experience with vector databases or hybrid search infrastructure — Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Milvus, OpenSearch, Elasticsearch, FAISS, or similar.
explicit_positive_requirements.embedding_query_text: vector database Pinecone Weaviate Qdrant Milvus OpenSearch Elasticsearch FAISS hybrid search infrastructure production operational experience

explicit_positive_requirements.label: Strong Python (code quality)
explicit_positive_requirements.evidence_in_jd: Strong Python. Yes really, we care about code quality.
explicit_positive_requirements.embedding_query_text: strong Python production code quality engineering best practices

explicit_positive_requirements.label: Ranking evaluation frameworks (NDCG/MRR/MAP, A/B)
explicit_positive_requirements.evidence_in_jd: Hands-on experience designing evaluation frameworks for ranking systems — NDCG, MRR, MAP, offline-to-online correlation, A/B test interpretation.
explicit_positive_requirements.embedding_query_text: evaluation framework ranking systems NDCG MRR MAP offline-to-online correlation A/B test interpretation precision recall

explicit_positive_requirements.label: 5-9 years total experience (band, not hard)
explicit_positive_requirements.embedding_query_text: senior engineer 5 to 9 years experience applied ML

nice_to_haves.label: LLM fine-tuning (LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT)
nice_to_haves.embedding_query_text: LLM fine-tuning LoRA QLoRA PEFT parameter-efficient

nice_to_haves.label: Learning-to-rank models (XGBoost or neural)
nice_to_haves.embedding_query_text: learning to rank LambdaMART XGBoost neural ranker

nice_to_haves.label: HR-tech / recruiting tech / marketplace exposure
nice_to_haves.embedding_query_text: HR tech recruiting marketplace talent intelligence job matching

nice_to_haves.label: Distributed systems / large-scale inference
nice_to_haves.embedding_query_text: distributed systems large-scale inference optimization microservices

nice_to_haves.label: Open-source contributions in AI/ML
nice_to_haves.embedding_query_text: open source contributions AI ML GitHub OSS

hard_disqualifiers.label: Pure research background, no production deployment
hard_disqualifiers.evidence_in_jd: If you've spent your career in pure research environments (academic labs, research-only roles) without any production deployment — we will not move forward.

hard_disqualifiers.label: AI experience only recent LangChain/OpenAI calls (<12mo)
hard_disqualifiers.evidence_in_jd: If your 'AI experience' consists primarily of recent (under 12 months) projects using LangChain to call OpenAI — we will probably not move forward, unless you can demonstrate substantial pre-LLM-era ML production experience.

detection_hints.absence_required: pre-LLM ML experience (e.g. XGBoost, scikit-learn, TensorFlow pre-2022, embeddings pre-2022)

hard_disqualifiers.label: No production code in last 18 months (moved to architecture/tech lead)
hard_disqualifiers.evidence_in_jd: If you are a senior engineer who hasn't written production code in the last 18 months because you've moved into 'architecture' or 'tech lead' roles — we will probably not move forward. This role writes code.

hard_disqualifiers.label: Title-chaser pattern (Senior → Staff → Principal by switching every 1.5 yrs)
hard_disqualifiers.evidence_in_jd: If your career trajectory shows you optimizing for 'Senior' → 'Staff' → 'Principal' titles by switching companies every 1.5 years, we're not a fit.

hard_disqualifiers.label: Career entirely at TCS/Infosys/Wipro/Accenture/Cognizant/Capgemini
hard_disqualifiers.evidence_in_jd: People who have only worked at consulting firms (TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini, etc.) in their entire career. If you're currently at one of these companies but have prior product-company experience, that's fine.

hard_disqualifiers.label: Primary expertise in CV/speech/robotics without NLP/IR exposure
hard_disqualifiers.evidence_in_jd: People whose primary expertise is computer vision, speech, or robotics without significant NLP/IR exposure.

hard_disqualifiers.label: 5+ years on closed-source proprietary systems without external validation
hard_disqualifiers.evidence_in_jd: People whose work has been entirely on closed-source proprietary systems for 5+ years without external validation (papers, talks, open-source). We need to see how you think, not just trust that you can think.

detection_hints.absence_required: github_activity_score >= 0 OR open_source_contributions OR publications OR talks

context_signals.salary_context: Series A startup; expect 30-60 LPA range for this role

core_retrieval_ir.embedding_query_text: embeddings retrieval vector database hybrid search BM25 dense bi-encoder cross-encoder semantic search

core_ranking_eval.embedding_query_text: NDCG MRR MAP ranking evaluation offline-to-online A/B test learning to rank LambdaMART

production_ml.embedding_query_text: MLOps production deployment model serving monitoring SLO scale users traffic

llm_engineering.embedding_query_text: LLM fine-tuning LoRA QLoRA PEFT RAG retrieval augmented generation vLLM TGI Triton serving

core_python_eng.embedding_query_text: Python FastAPI asyncio pytest production code quality
